help: Prints the status of all Intrigue territories and subfactions, including faction details, doctrine, colors, and relationships.
Spawns a fleet of the specified size for the given faction ID. Useful for testing faction fleets in Intrigue territories.

Injects an entanglement between two subfactions in a territory. Types: HIRED_PROTECTION, PROXY_SUPPORT, SHARED_ENEMY_PACT, RETALIATION_COALITION, TERRITORIAL_WAR, CIVIL_WAR. Duration defaults to condition-based for war types, 90 days for others.
Removes an entanglement between two subfactions. Use 'all all' for subfaction args to clear all entanglements in a territory.
